meanings.definition: relevant relation or interconnection
examples: those issues have no bearing on our situation

dignified manner or conduct
characteristic way of bearing one's body

a rotating support placed between moving parts to allow them to move easily
have
cause to be born
put up with something or somebody unpleasant

he learned to tolerate the heat

meanings.definition: move while holding up or supporting
bring forth,

meanings.definition: support or hold in a certain manner
